sourceTitle: GeoNames Syrian Arab Republic Gazetteer Extract

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-localities/geonames-locality-match-report.json
rawFiles.notes: Previous automated GeoNames locality match report containing skipped ambiguous and duplicate candidates.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-localities/geonames-locality-manual-review-2026-06-28.json
rawFiles.notes: Manual review decisions for clear skipped GeoNames locality candidates.

transforms: Reviewed skipped GeoNames locality candidates from the previous automated match report.
Accepted only clear manual matches with source-compatible GeoNames populated-place records and no duplicate GeoNames assignment.
Added GeoNames IDs to accepted locality records.
Added selected GeoNames names as English alternate-spelling aliases where they did not duplicate existing names.
Updated locality kind using the same feature-code rule as the previous GeoNames import: PPLA3 as town, PPLC/PPLA/PPLA2 as city.
Left unclear cases unresolved for future manual review.
reviewNotes: Accepted 28 additional GeoNames locality matches from skipped candidates. Added 28 aliases and updated 2 locality kind values. Left 10 unclear skipped localities unresolved.
